name: @independo/inderun-route-core-wasm
description: WASM wrapper package for the IndeRun Rust route-planning core.

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "process.exit(require('fs').existsSync('generated/inderun_route_core_bg.wasm')?0:(console.error('Missing generated WASM bindings — build the Rust core with wasm-bindgen before publishing (see CLAUDE.md).'),1))"
